channel.title: competition on adhyaksa
channel.description: Recent content in competition on adhyaksa

item.title: My Jabar Data Viz Festival Submission
item.description: Just now, I commit to this awesome data visualization competition (quite rare to be found in Indonesia I presumed) held by Jabar Digital Service. Kindly check the visualization I’ve made through this link. If you like it, feel free to give it a star ⭐ Oh, and here is the preview of my visualization: Have a good day 😊
